title: zornia setifera
intro: Zornia setifera, also known as Prickly Zornia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Zornia setifera include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Zornia setifera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
